site.name: Amazon.com
site.mechanism_justification: Amazon requires JavaScript rendering to load full product data (price, title, images, reviews). The pre-verified probe confirmed that Playwright (no proxy) successfully accesses product pages without captcha. Direct HTTP requests to Amazon product pages return incomplete HTML with bot-detection challenges. Playwright provides full DOM access to extract all product fields.

anti_bot.details: Amazon has mild anti-bot protection (CAPTCHA challenges on suspicious traffic), but the probe returned captcha-free with Playwright. No Cloudflare, Akamai, or PerimeterX detected. Standard rate-limiting applies — excessive requests will trigger CAPTCHA.

connectivity.notes: Playwright without proxy works. Direct HTTP fails. If Playwright starts getting CAPTCHAs, escalate to datacenter or residential proxy.

product_discovery.url_pattern_notes: Amazon product URLs revolve around the ASIN (Amazon Standard Identification Number), a 10-character alphanumeric code. Common URL patterns: /dp/{ASIN}, /gp/product/{ASIN}, /product/{ASIN}. URLs may include referral tags after /ref=. The ASIN is always present and can be extracted from any product URL pattern. Input URLs may use any of these formats.

asin.extraction: Extract from URL or from input[name='ASIN'] or #ASIN

rate_limiting.justification: Amazon has mild but real rate limiting. Too many rapid requests will trigger CAPTCHA even on clean IPs. 3 second delay between requests is conservative but safe.
